content:
✨ dangerzone | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To safely convert untrusted documents into a secure PDF format, mitigating potential security risks from malicious content.
✨ Key Features: • Sandboxed document conversion • Conversion to pixel-based PDFs • Optional OCR for text layer • PDF compression • Support for various document and image formats
📖 Summary: Dangerzone is a security tool that converts potentially dangerous documents (PDFs, Office files, images) into safe, pixel-based PDFs. It achieves this by processing the documents within a sandboxed environment, converting them to raw pixel data, and then reconstructing them as new PDFs, thus neutralizing embedded threats.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
